translations.hi: उसने अपनी डिग्री पूरी कर ली।
translations.da: Han blev færdig med sin uddannelse.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 3rd person singular nominative masculine; grammatical subject of the clause.
Finite auxiliary (3rd person singular, present) forming the present perfect with the past participle 'gemacht'.
Possessive determiner; masculine accusative singular agreeing with 'Abschluss'; marks possession by a 3rd person singular masculine possessor.
Common noun; masculine accusative singular; direct object of the verb phrase (what was done/completed).
Past participle (Partizip II) of the lexical verb; complements auxiliary 'hat' to form the present perfect; expresses the completed action.

sentences.target: Ich brauche meinen Abschluss für die Bewerbung.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈbʁaʊ̯xə ˈmaɪ̯nən ˈapʃlʊs fyːɐ̯ diː bəˈvɛʁbʊŋ/

translations.de: Ich brauche meinen Abschluss für die Bewerbung.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈbʁaʊ̯xə ˈmaɪ̯nən ˈapʃlʊs fyːɐ̯ diː bəˈvɛʁbʊŋ/
translations.en: I need my degree for the application.
translations.es: Necesito mi título para la solicitud.
translations.fr: J'ai besoin de mon diplôme pour postuler.
translations.it: Mi serve la laurea per candidarmi.
translations.zh-Hans: 申请时需要我的学位证。
translations.ru: Для подачи заявки мне нужен диплом.
translations.pt: Preciso do meu diploma para a candidatura.
translations.he: אני צריכה את התואר בשביל להגיש.
translations.vi: Tôi cần bằng cấp cho hồ sơ ứng tuyển.
translations.ar: أحتاج إلى شهادتي من أجل التقديم.
translations.nl: Voor de sollicitatie heb ik mijn diploma nodig.
translations.uk: Для подання заявки мені потрібен диплом.
translations.hu: A jelentkezéshez szükségem van a diplomámra.
translations.hi: आवेदन के लिए मुझे अपनी डिग्री चाहिए।
translations.el: Χρειάζομαι το πτυχίο μου για την αίτηση.
translations.nb: Jeg trenger vitnemålet mitt til søknaden.
translations.sv: Jag behöver mitt examensbevis till ansökan.
translations.ro: Am nevoie de diplomă pentru înscriere.
translations.da: Jeg skal bruge mit eksamensbevis til ansøgningen.
translations.ja: 応募には学位証明書が必要です。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb (1st person singular, present); governs an accusative object.
Possessive determiner; masculine accusative singular agreeing with 'Abschluss'; marks 1st person singular possession.
Common noun; masculine accusative singular; direct object of 'brauche'.
Preposition selecting accusative; introduces a prepositional phrase expressing purpose.
Definite article; feminine accusative singular; determines 'Bewerbung' as the object of 'für'.
Common noun; feminine accusative singular; object of the preposition 'für' (prepositional complement).

sentences.target: Zum Abschluss gehen wir noch ein Eis essen.
sentences.reading: /tsʊm ˈapʃlʊs ˈɡeːən viːɐ̯ nɔx aɪ̯n aɪ̯s ˈɛsən/

translations.de: Zum Abschluss gehen wir noch ein Eis essen.
translations.ipa: /tsʊm ˈapʃlʊs ˈɡeːən viːɐ̯ nɔx aɪ̯n aɪ̯s ˈɛsən/
translations.en: To wrap up, we’re going for ice cream.
translations.es: Para terminar, vamos a tomar un helado.
translations.fr: Pour finir, on va manger une glace.
translations.it: Per finire, andiamo a prendere un gelato.
translations.zh-Hans: 最后我们去吃个冰淇淋。
translations.pt: Para terminar, vamos tomar um sorvete.
translations.vi: Kết thúc, chúng ta đi ăn kem.
translations.ar: في النهاية، سنذهب لنأكل آيس كريم.
translations.nl: Als afslutning gaan we nog een ijsje eten.
translations.uk: На завершення ми підемо їсти морозиво.
translations.hi: अंत में हम आइसक्रीम खाने जा रहे हैं।
translations.nb: Som avslutning går vi og cпiser is.
translations.id: Sebagai penutup, kita pergi makan es krim.
translations.sv: Som avslutning går vi och äter glass.
translations.ro: Ca să încheiem, mergem să mâncăm înghețată.
translations.da: Som afslutning går vi ud og spiser is.
translations.ja: 最後にアイスを食べに行きます。

tokens.explanation: Preposition in contracted form (zu + dem); selects dative; introduces the PP 'zum Abschluss' (idiomatic: as/for the conclusion).
Common noun; masculine dative singular; object of 'zu' within the prepositional phrase; functions as a sentence-initial adverbial.
Finite main verb (1st person plural, present, V2 position); takes a bare infinitival complement 'essen' indicating the activity.
Personal pronoun; 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Adverb modifying the predicate; adds the nuance of 'still/also/then' to the action.
Indefinite article; neuter accusative singular; determines 'Eis' as the direct object of 'essen'.
Common noun; neuter accusative singular; direct object of the infinitive 'essen'.
Bare infinitive; clausal complement (infinitival, xcomp) to 'gehen' indicating the action intended.

translations.es: Mi graduación es el próximo año.
translations.fr: Ma remise de diplôme est l'année prochaine.
translations.ru: Я закончу учёбу в следующем году.
translations.pt: Minha formatura é no ano que vem.
translations.vi: Tôi sẽ tốt nghiệp vào năm sau.
translations.hi: मेरा स्नातक समारोह अगले साल है।
translations.el: Η αποφοίτησή μου είναι του χρόνου.

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; masculine nominative singular agreeing with 'Abschluss'; marks 1st person singular possession.
Common noun; masculine nominative singular; grammatical subject in a copular clause.
Finite copula auxiliary (3rd person singular, present) linking the subject to the predicate nominal.
Attributive adjective; nominative neuter singular (strong inflection) modifying 'Jahr' within the predicate NP.
Common noun; neuter nominative singular; predicate nominal in the copular construction indicating time.
